summary: Middle East conflict causing oil price spike (+19% energy commodities forecast), Strait of Hormuz closures possible. US intervention in Venezuela and Iran civil unrest. NATO posture in Greenland escalating. Trump preparing Iran blockade. IMF global growth at 3.1%, headline inflation 4.4%. Tariff uncertainty persists.
